accurate.why: All claims match the bill text: reauthorization extending 2025 to 2030 and amending the Further Consolidated Appropriations Act, 2020.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; all statements are supported by the bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the bill reauthorizes funding to monitor, assess, and research the Great Lakes Basin.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly notes the bill amends the Further Consolidated Appropriations Act, 2020, by extending the authorization date.

exceptions_conditions.why: The bill contains no material exceptions, conditions, or carve-outs.

effective_dates.why: Notes the extension from 2025 to 2030 and the December 26, 2025 approval date.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the sole operative provision: extending the authorization from 2025 to 2030.

objective_tone.why: The summary is neutral and free of editorializing.

coherent.why: The summary is well-organized and reads clearly.

concise.why: The summary is brief and free of padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names the Act and the Further Consolidated Appropriations Act, 2020.

correct_figures.why: Dates stated (2025 to 2030, December 26, 2025) are accurate.
